emails.subject: FW: FW: Enfolio Contract with CPS
emails.body: The contract is attached, Please ignore their requested changes cause I did not agree to them. The credit worksheet was prepared by Russell Diamond as of 10/01/99. Forwarded by Dan J Hyvl/HOU/ECT on 01/02/2001 04:28 PM "Pfister, Christian W." <CWPfister@cps-satx.com> 12/15/2000 05:48 PM

emails.subject: Re: FW: FW: Enfolio Contract with CPS
emails.body: Re: FW: FW: Enfolio Contract with CPS Dan, With regards to the Master negotiations with City Public Service, I am OK to increase the collateral threshold to $15MM for both counterparty's. Sorry for the delay, Russell. Dan J Hyvl 01/02/2001 04:32 PM
